title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.910 - Adjutant general may elect to purchase insurance or be self-insurer
text:
41.910.  Adjutant general may elect to purchase insurance or be self-insurer. — The adjutant general may exercise the option to self-insure or to purchase insurance in the best interest of the state and may do what is necessary to carry out the purposes of sections 41.900 to 41.940.
(L. 1967 p. 119 § 2)
